calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-26-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Priscilla Wong for and with Warren Chin (Administrator).

The Court informed Ms. Wong that the original death certificates of the Claimants under the 13100 affidavits need to be paper filed with the Court and that her declaration regarding retention of the original bank statement also needs to be filed. The Second and Final Account, etc. is taken under submission subject to filing of the above documents. If said documents are not filed by August 2, 2017, the matter will be put back on our hearing calendar. The Court informed Counsel that it will be allowing the actions of the Administrator, but it will not be approving them.

Judge: Peter J. Busch/John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Nov-02-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Priscilla Wong for petitioner Albert Chinn.

The Court noted that no objection to the granting of the petition had been received, and asked Ms. Wong if she was aware of any objection or expected any opposition to it. Ms. Wong responded that she did not. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).
The Court set a Status Hearing re Petition for Final Distribution for January 17, 2017 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not reported)
